data.name: 血色流亡者
data.detailed_description:
-故事-


曾經有一位叫仁齋的將軍創立了一個稱為「光之庭」的實驗機構，聚集了一大批的戰爭遺孤，讓他們成為了開發研究特殊能力的實驗體，最後將他們打造成士兵為他所用。

南方軍譴責這個行為並且與北方軍爆發了多次戰爭，這些光之庭的實驗體們被派遣至前線打前鋒，爆發了多場戰鬥，包含了鼎鼎大名的魔法師露娜芙蕾雅。

而再後來「光之庭」出現了逃跑事件，
逃走的有庫勒、蕾茵、約翰、吉尼這四個人，
但是在逃跑的途中，吉尼被抓住了。

逃跑成功的庫勒他們，為了不想再出現更多受害者而踏上了尋找返回光之庭的旅程，
雖然一直沒能找到光之庭，但他們與另一名也叫露娜芙蕾雅的女性邂逅，許多事情也在逐漸好轉。
但這卻也將庫勒他們捲進了北方大陸與南方大陸的大規模戰爭中......

-遊戲系統-


回合制的戰鬥模式、地圖探索 、還有多種角色可供操作遊玩，
使用經典的RPG戰鬥系統，採用單獨AP，
還有在戰鬥中被敵人襲擊的戰鬥H！

遊戲包含探索與分支的元素，希望能讓玩家更沉浸在遊戲中，
以及在前作受到好評的場景在本作也更加精心的進行製作。

色情場景也經過了精心調整，語音量也大大增加！

-H場景-


主要類型為NTR與凌辱，一般H與戰鬥H約各20種，
其他小事件則約有10種左右。

NTR有一些不可迴避的事件劇情，
但是可以選擇整段跳過。

事件回想包含一般事件與戰鬥H，
當遊戲通關時即可打開全部的事件回想。

■遊戲推薦規格■


在遊戲中可以選擇負荷較少的輕量版。

・顯卡
Geforce GTX1050Ti
Radeon RX470

・CPU
Intel i5 2.5GHz
Ryzen 3 1200

・記憶體
8 GB RAM

DirectX 11 或 DirectX 12 對應的顯卡。

■操作方式


支持滑鼠跟鍵盤。控制器支持XInput。
遊戲的UI介面會依照玩家使用的裝置轉換。

・顯卡
Geforce GTX1050Ti
Radeon RX470

・CPU
Intel i5 2.5GHz
Ryzen 3 1200

・記憶體
8 GB RAM

遊戲的UI介面會依照玩家使用的裝置轉換。
data.short_description: 『即使是只能用爬的也要前進...就算前方是充滿鮮血的戰場...』 這是一個圍繞著復仇與國家戰爭間的色情奇幻故事。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: Intel i5 2.5GHz / Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card / Geforce GTX1050Ti / Radeon RX470
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Blood Crawler
data.detailed_description:
-Story-

There was a man named Shogun Jinsai, who set up an experimental facility called the Garden of Light, where he collected war orphans and used them as test subjects to develop special abilities. He then used them as soldiers.

The Southern Army condemned this inhumane practice, and the Northern Army fought each other time and again,
The children of the Garden of Light were sent to the front. At this time, Lunaflare also joined the war, and many battles were fought along the Veil Line.

This was the case in the Garden of Light, but once there was an escape.
The escapees were Crowe, Rain, Johan and Jeani.
Jeani, however, was captured on his way out.

After the escape, Crowe and his friends set out to find another Garden of Light to prevent more deaths.
For a long time they were unable to find the Garden of Light, although things began to change when they met a woman who called herself Lunaflare,
This leads Crowe and his friends into a major conflict between the northern and southern continents.

-About the game-


Turn-based battle game with map exploration and more characters to play!

It uses an orthodox RPG combat system with its own unique AP.
There is also combat eroticism, where enemies attack you during combat.

There are also exploration and branching elements, and we want to create something that can be enjoyed as a game in its own right.
The scenario that was well-received in the previous title is even more carefully crafted in this one.

The erotic scenes have also been carefully crafted, with shaders and textures adjusted for each cut, and the character voice has been greatly increased.

-H Scene-


The main genre is NTR and rape, with about 20 scenes each of basic scenes and battle erotica,

However, NTR has unavoidable scenes,
It is possible to skip the scene in question.

It is not for those who want to see erotic scenes immediately,
but for those who want to see erotic scenes immediately.

The memory scenes correspond to both normal events and combat erotica.
All memories can also be accessed by clearing the game.

■Recommended operating environment■


You can also choose to run a lighter version of the game with less graphics load during gameplay.

・Gravo Standard
Geforce GTX1050Ti
Radeon RX470

・CPU Guideline
Intel i5 2.5GHz
Ryzen 3 1200

・Memory Approximate
8 GB RAM

・DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 capable graphics card

■Operation


Mouse and keyboard support. Pads support Xinput.
Game UI is set to automatically change the notation depending on the device.

data.short_description: "Even if we have to crawl, we must go forward... Even if the battlefield is filled with blood..." This is an erotic fantasy story about revenge and national war.
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: Intel i5 2.5GHz / Ryzen 3 1200
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 or DirectX 12 compatible graphics card / Geforce GTX1050Ti / Radeon RX470
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
